---
title: "Science Café"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="sc-section-teal">
  <p class="sc-eyebrow" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75)">Monthly in-person event</p>
  <h1 style="font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,44px);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px;">Science Café</h1>
  <p style="font-size:17px;opacity:0.88;max-width:520px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.65;">A space where curious people come together to talk about science. No lectures, no slides — just a great topic and a room full of people who want to understand the world better.</p>
</div>

<!-- Next event -->
<section class="sc-section">
  <div class="sc-inner">
    <div class="sc-label">Next event</div>
    <div class="sc-cafe-card" style="max-width:700px;">
      <div class="sc-cafe-date">
        <div class="sc-cafe-month">Jun</div>
        <div class="sc-cafe-day">11</div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="sc-cafe-title">Is AI making us worse at thinking?</div>
        <div class="sc-cafe-detail">📍 The Common Room, 14 Broad Street · 7:00–9:00 pm</div>
        <div class="sc-cafe-detail">🎟 Free admission · All welcome</div>
        <div class="sc-cafe-desc">From GPS eroding our sense of direction to autocomplete finishing our sentences, we've been offloading cognitive tasks to machines for decades. Come with your opinions, your doubts, and your questions.</div>
        <a href="#rsvp" class="btn btn-teal">Reserve your seat →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- How it works -->
<section class="sc-section-warm">
  <div class="sc-inner" style="max-width:760px;">
    <div class="sc-label">How it works</div>
    <div class="sc-steps">
      <div class="sc-step">
        <div class="sc-step-num">1</div>
        <div class="sc-step-text">
          <strong>We pick a topic</strong>
          Topics come from our community — science in the news, emerging research, or a big question someone's been mulling. Announced two weeks before each event.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sc-step">
        <div class="sc-step-num">2</div>
        <div class="sc-step-text">
          <strong>We gather and talk</strong>
          Doors open at 6:30 pm, discussion starts at 7 pm. A facilitator guides the conversation — no experts, no panels, no wrong answers. Everyone participates.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sc-step">
        <div class="sc-step-num">3</div>
        <div class="sc-step-text">
          <strong>We share a recap</strong>
          After each event, a short summary goes on the blog. Some discussions become podcast episodes.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sc-step">
        <div class="sc-step-num">4</div>
        <div class="sc-step-text">
          <strong>You suggest the next topic</strong>
          At the end of every Café, we vote on future topics. Your idea might be next.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- RSVP -->
<section class="sc-section" id="rsvp">
  <div class="sc-inner-form">
    <div class="sc-label">Reserve your seat</div>
    <p style="font-size:15px;color:var(--ink-muted);margin-bottom:24px;">Free to attend — we just ask you to RSVP so we can plan seating and refreshments.</p>
    <div class="sc-form">
      <div>
        <label class="sc-label-text">Full name</label>
        <input type="text" class="sc-input" placeholder="Your name">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="sc-label-text">Email address</label>
        <input type="email" class="sc-input" placeholder="you@example.com">
      </div>
      <div>
        <label class="sc-label-text">How did you hear about us?</label>
        <select class="sc-input">
          <option value="">Select an option</option>
          <option>Friend or colleague</option>
          <option>Social media</option>
          <option>The blog or podcast</option>
          <option>Flyer or poster</option>
          <option>Other</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-muted);cursor:pointer;">
        <input type="checkbox" style="width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:var(--teal);">
        Add me to the mailing list for future events
      </label>
      <button onclick="document.getElementById('rsvp-confirm').style.display='block'" class="btn btn-teal">Confirm RSVP →</button>
      <p id="rsvp-confirm" class="sc-confirm">✓ You're on the list! We'll send a reminder the day before.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Past topics -->
<section class="sc-section-warm">
  <div class="sc-inner" style="max-width:700px;">
    <div class="sc-label">Past discussions</div>
    <ul class="sc-past-list">
      <li><strong>May 2025</strong> — Should scientists be activists? The case for and against advocacy</li>
      <li><strong>Apr 2025</strong> — What does "natural" even mean? A scientific and philosophical deep-dive</li>
      <li><strong>Mar 2025</strong> — The future of food: insects, lab meat, and vertical farming</li>
      <li><strong>Feb 2025</strong> — Consciousness: do animals experience it, and how would we know?</li>
      <li><strong>Jan 2025</strong> — Gene editing: who decides what counts as a disease?</li>
      <li><strong>Dec 2024</strong> — Is the universe finite — and does it matter if it is?</li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="sc-about-strip">
  <h2>Want to suggest a topic?</h2>
  <p>Great Science Café topics are ones where reasonable people disagree, science is illuminating, and curiosity is contagious.</p>
  <a href="../about/index.qmd#contact" class="btn btn-outline">Send your idea →</a>
</section>
